created.description: Creation time of the request in ISO 8601

tilingGridId.description: This parameter was moved to tilingGrid

resolution.description: This parameter was moved to tilingGrid.

bucketName.description: Simplified alternative for specifying where the results shall be written, where only the bucket name is specified. Specifying `some-bucket` as `bucketName` is equivalent to specifying `s3://some-bucket` as the `defaultTilePath` in `output`.

description.description: Optional description that can be used to keep track of requests

valueEstimate.description: Estimated processing value (cost) of the request in [processing units](https://docs.planet.com/platform/processing-units/). The accuracy of the estimate depends on your request, as described in the [documentation](https://docs.sentinel-hub.com/api/latest/api/batch/#cost-estimate).

userAction.description: Last user action on the request

userActionUpdated.description: Time of last user action update in ISO 8601

status.description: Current processing status of the request

error.description: Error description for requests that were submitted but failed during analysis or processing
